Defines structures for JavaScript source code, logging macros, and JavaScript wrapper function macros.


## Files
- **[js_source.h](js_source.h.md)**: Defines a structure for JavaScript source code with name, source, and length fields.
- **[logging.h](logging.h.md)**: Defines macros for conditional and unconditional logging using `printf`.
- **[wrappers.h](wrappers.h.md)**: Macros for declaring and registering JavaScript wrapper functions, class constructors, and argument checks.
